name: USP消音版 | 27
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. This custom paint job features a winged defuser beneath the rear sight and \"027\" near the ejection port. Light field work
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这款定制涂装在后瞄准器下方配有带翼的拆弹器，并在抛壳口附近标有“027”。 轻量野外作业
